hero.title: Game Animation Sample
hero.description: Learn how to build functional gameplay animation systems with undreds of AAA quality animations

hero.title: Cassini Sample
hero.description: The Cassini Sample takes you to space to demonstrate the latest features of the Procedural Contant Generation (PCG) Framework through the creation of a space station and Saturn's rings.'

feature.title: Cassini Sample
feature.description: The Cassini Sample takes you to space to demonstrate the latest features of the Procedural Contant Generation (PCG) Framework through the creation of a space station and Saturn's rings.'

feature.title: Mutable Sample
feature.description: This project showcases Mutable UE Plugin features.

feature.title: Game Animation Sample
feature.description: Learn how to build functional gameplay animation systems with undreds of AAA quality animations

feature.title: Electric Dreams Env
feature.description: At this year's State of Unreal at GDC, we offered a first look at an Experimental new feature that would ship with the upcoming Unreal Engine 5.2 release. The demo, entitled Electric Dreams, showed off the Procedural Content Generation framework (PCG)

feature.title: ML Deformer Sample
feature.description: The Machine Learning Deformer Sample demonstrates how Unreal Engine’s ML technology can be used to create a high-fidelity next-generation character.

feature.title: Hillside Sample Project
feature.description: Project Hillside is an Unreal Engine architectural sample project developed by Epic Games,Safdie Architects, and Neoscape that showcases Moshe Safdie’s original unbuilt architectural design proposal, as well as the existing building “Habitat 67.”

feature.title: MetaHumans
feature.description: The updated version for UE5 showcases MetaHuman features and includes a brand-new level to help you learn ragdoll setup and how to use animation states, AI, and Control Rig with MetaHumans.

feature.title: Content Examples
feature.description: The Content Examples project has been built to help you quickly get up to speed with a variety of different techniques and artistic applications for building your own games. Along the walls of each room, you will find any number of demo stations, at each of which you will see various applications of the topic at hand

feature.title: Slay Animation Sample
feature.description: As animation pipelines continue to evolve by embracing real-time technology, studios like Mold3D Studio can leverage new content creation methodologies.

feature.title: ICVFX Production Test
feature.description: Dive into the deep end and prepare to run a multi-user nDisplay system with the In-Camera VFX Production Test project.

feature.title: Automotive Configurator
feature.description: Configuring a new car has changed dramatically since the first mass-produced vehicles rolled off the assembly line in 1908 and customers infamously could have any color they wanted as long as it was black.

game.title: Project Titan
game.description: This project is a 3D reproduction of the concept art by Antonio Demico, recreated in a full Overwatch stylized approach.

game.title: Cropout Sample Project
game.description: Cropout is a sample top-down Casual RTS game that demonstrates all the best practices for building a project designed for cross-platform release.

game.title: Lyra Starter Game
game.description: Lyra Starter Game is a new sample gameplay project released with UE5. While the feature set being released is just a core base, this game is still intended to be an excellent starting point for game developers to create new projects, as well as a hands-on learning resource.

game.title: Stack O Bot
game.description: Stack O Bot has been fully rebuilt from the ground up for Unreal Engine 5.6. Designed to be a great learning resource and a perfect starting point for new developers exploring modern game creation.

game.title: Valley of the Ancient
game.description: Download and explore Epic's Valley of the Ancient sample project! Get to know Unreal Engine 5 Early Access's new rendering, open worlds, audio, and animation technologies - including Nanite, Lumen, World Partition, FBIK, Motion Warping, and Control Rig. Fly over a 2x2km photorealistic environment composed of Quixel MegaScan assets, then transition to a mythical world demonstrating new interactive gameplay features.
